differences.title: 1. Dev Server
differences.leftDesc: Leverages native browser ESM for blazing fast cold starts and HMR.
differences.rightDesc: Bundles modules into static assets for production, slower dev server.

differences.title: 2. Build Speed
differences.leftDesc: Faster builds by compiling dependencies only once.
differences.rightDesc: Optimizes bundle size by removing unused code.

differences.title: 3. Plugins
differences.leftDesc: Uses Rollup for production builds, simpler plugin API.
differences.rightDesc: Vast plugin ecosystem for complex configurations and transformations.

differences.title: 4. Configuration
differences.leftDesc: Sensible defaults, minimal configuration needed out-of-the-box.
differences.rightDesc: Requires more detailed configuration for optimal performance.

differences.title: 5. HMR
differences.leftDesc: Hot Module Replacement is exceptionally fast due to native ESM.
differences.rightDesc: Established and reliable Hot Module Replacement capabilities.

differences.title: 6. Community
differences.rightDesc: Large, established community with extensive resources.

differences.title: 7. Use Case
differences.leftDesc: Ideal for new projects and frameworks needing speed.
differences.rightDesc: Well-suited for existing projects and complex setups.
